# harvester_kubeovn_vpc_nat_gateway (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_vpc_nat_gateway" "example" {
  name = "my-nat-gateway"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

- `name` (String) A unique name
